mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_inventory (product_id, total_quantity, available_quantity, locked_quantity, sold_quantity, warning_quantity, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{totalQuantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{lockedQuantity}, #{soldQuantity}, #{warningQuantity}, #{version}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE product_inventory SET available_quantity = available_quantity + #{quantity}, total_quantity = total_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE product_inventory SET available_quantity = available_quantity + #{quantity}, locked_quantity = locked_quantity - #{quantity}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE product_inventory SET locked_quantity = locked_quantity - #{quantity}, sold_quantity = sold_quantity + #{quantity}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_id = #{productId}
